name: PMDG 737-800 4.0.18
description: The PMDG 737 for Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024 is a highly detailed, study-level simulation of the Boeing 737NG, featuring advanced systems, realistic flight dynamics, and enhanced visuals built specifically for the new sim platform.

name: IniBuilds New York JFK Enhanced 1.0.2
description: The iniBuilds New York JFK Enhanced for MSFS 2024 is a highly detailed, performance-optimized recreation of John F. Kennedy International Airport with updated layouts, custom ground textures, and realistic terminal and lighting enhancements reflecting the airport’s latest real-world state.
